description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and specific backport branches, on pull requests to those branches, and daily at 6AM UTC. The workflow consists of four jobs: lint, test, test-summary, and deploy. The lint job checks code style with Python 3.x, the test job runs unit tests on multiple Python versions and operating systems, the test-summary job aggregates test results, and the deploy job creates a release on push of a tag.
